title: Driveline Layout Proposal (v1)
description: A panel-placement proposal for a freshly-opened source. The Format Agent's visualisation-bootstrap call (docs/12-format-agent.md §7) is constrained to this schema; the proposal is applied through the __drivelineAgent v2 write ops (createPanel/bindChannels/setMapBinding). It is DATA, not code: it can only reference channel ids that exist (post-validated client-side) and is capped per panel. Single source of truth for the TS `LayoutProposal` interface (apps/web/src/llm/layoutProposal.types.ts).

rationale.description: A short human-readable explanation of the proposed layout, shown to the user as plain text (untrusted model output — never rendered as HTML).

plotPanel.description: A signal plot of up to MAX_PLOT_SERIES scalar channels.

yAxisGroups.description: Optional grouping of channelIds onto shared y-axes (channels sharing a unit / range).

mapPanel.description: A Leaflet map driven by a latitude/longitude channel pair.

enumPanel.description: An enum lane of discrete-state channels.

tablePanel.description: A tabular value readout of channels.

valuePanel.description: A single-value readout of channels at the cursor.
